ignitium_prep.title: Ensure you have Cursium Ingots from Maledictus (Ch09 rib) before proceeding

subtitle.text: The Cataclysm chain does not stop. You have to stop it.

description: Ancient Remnant → Maledictus (Ch09) → Annihilator + Ignis → Emulator
You need Cursium Ingots from Maledictus to unlock Ignis.
If you didn't collect them in Ch09, return now.
The infernal_age is gated behind the Netherite Monstrosity kill.
The Netherite Monstrosity drops lacrima — the trigger item.
The Biological Civilization is the Corrupted Eye's lineage.
Warped Mosco (Alex's Mobs) and the Netherite Monstrosity
are both part of the Corrupted Eye ingredient chain.
The Cataclysm chapter is the most combat-intensive in the progression.
It requires the scroll gates: living_decay and infernal_passage.
Both needed before these bosses can be damaged.
